name: feature.tool-output-compaction.nodes
description: Tool-output compaction node (ADR 0099) — an explicit mid-graph node that compacts a verbose JSON payload over the ctx.features['tool-output-compaction'] surface (one shared kernel). Structure-preserving by default; optional lossy array-elision. Pure + deterministic ⇒ recorded output is replay-safe.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Compact Tool Output
nodes.description: Compacts a JSON string (minify + drop empty fields; optional lossy array-elision) to cut token spend before it reaches a model. Non-JSON passes through untouched. Over ctx.features['tool-output-compaction'].
